name: git_utils
description: Full git workflow in one script: show commit log, view commit diffs, create/switch branches, stage files, commit changes, stash, check status, and set config. Replaces multiple sequential 'cd <repo> && git ...' calls for the most common git operations.
when_to_use: Use when you need to perform git operations: view commit history (log), inspect commits (show), compare changes (diff), annotate files (blame), create feature branches (branch), stage files (add), commit (commit), stash work-in-progress (stash), check working tree (status), or configure git (config). Replaces 2-4 separate bash commands per operation (cd to repo + git command). The 'branch', 'add', and 'commit' actions are particularly useful during development workflows when creating branches, staging modified files, and committing changes. The 'config' action avoids the common 'Author identity unknown' error by setting user config in one step.

parameters.name: repo_dir
parameters.description: Path to the git repository root (e.g. /app)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: 'log' (show commit log), 'show' (show commit details), 'diff' (show diff), 'blame' (file blame), 'branch' (create/switch branch), 'add' (stage files), 'commit' (commit staged changes), 'stash' (stash operations), 'status' (working tree status), 'config' (set git config)

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional options: --oneline, --all, --reverse, --count=N (default: 20), --since=DATE, --file=PATH, --stat, --cached, --from=REF, --to=REF, -m 'MESSAGE' (commit message), --author='Name <email>', --force (force branch create), --short (short status), --global (global config)

examples.expected: Last 5 commits affecting tracer.go across all branches.
Commit details with file change stats for hash abc1234.
Diff stat between HEAD~5 and HEAD.
Create and switch to new branch 'improve-feature'.
Stage file1.go and file2.go for commit.
Commit staged changes with the given message and author.

cost_saving_rationale: Combines 'cd <repo> && git ...' sequences into a single script call, reducing 2-4 round trips per git operation. The 'branch' + 'add' + 'commit' workflow replaces 4-6 separate tool calls (cd, git checkout -b, git add, git status, git commit) with 3 script calls. The 'config' action avoids the common 'Author identity unknown' error that blocks commits, saving debugging round trips. Covers common git operations (log, show, diff, blame, branch, add, commit, stash, status, config) that appear 10+ times per trajectory.
